input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.1.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.1.1.3
            TITLE: all waste/rejected heat from the primary heat cycle may be used. the method of conversion is

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.1.1.3: All waste/rejected heat from the primary heat cycle may be used. The method of conversion is
IC.1.1.3 All waste/rejected heat from the primary heat cycle may be used. The method of conversion is 
not limited to the four stroke cycle.

final_answer: rule IC.1.1.3: All waste/rejected heat from the primary heat cycle may be used. The method of conversion is IC.1.1.3 All waste/rejected heat from the primary heat cycle may be used. The method of conversion is not limited to the four stroke cycle.
